description: Harmonized person data table containing standardized and consolidated information about applicants and inventors across all patent applications.

columns.name: person_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each harmonized person record.

columns.name: person_name
columns.description: Standardized full name of the person or organization after harmonization.

columns.name: person_name_orig_lg
columns.description: Original name in the native language before standardization.

columns.name: person_address
columns.description: Standardized full address of the person or organization.

columns.name: person_ctry_code
columns.description: Two-letter country code of the person's location.

columns.name: nuts
columns.description: NUTS regional code for geographic location within Europe.

columns.name: nuts_level
columns.description: Level of NUTS classification (0=country, 1=major region, 2=region, 3=small region).

columns.name: doc_std_name_id
columns.description: Identifier linking to the standardized name in the name harmonization system.

columns.name: doc_std_name
columns.description: Standardized name using document-level harmonization rules.

columns.name: psn_id
columns.description: Person sector identifier grouping entities by economic sector.

columns.name: psn_name
columns.description: Name associated with the person sector classification.

columns.name: psn_level
columns.description: Hierarchical level in the person sector classification system.

columns.name: psn_sector
columns.description: Economic sector classification (e.g., COMPANY, UNIVERSITY, GOVERNMENT, INDIVIDUAL).

columns.name: han_id
columns.description: Harmonized entity identifier grouping records belonging to the same real-world entity.

columns.name: han_name
columns.description: Harmonized name representing the consolidated entity across all variations.

columns.name: han_harmonized
columns.description: Flag indicating the level or quality of harmonization applied to the record.
